1	# DDx Root Makefile
2	# Builds and installs DDx through the canonical installer path.
3	
4	# Build variables
5	VERSION ?= $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty)
6	CLI_DIR = cli
7	CLI_BINARY = $(CLI_DIR)/build/ddx
8	
9	.PHONY: all build clean test lint install help cli-build cli-clean cli-test cli-lint cli-bead-schema cli-skill-schema bead-schema skill-schema docs-routing-lint
10	
11	# Default target - build CLI
12	all: build
13	
14	# Build CLI
15	build: cli-build
16		@echo "✅ DDx CLI built at $(CLI_BINARY)"
17	
18	# Clean all build artifacts
19	clean: cli-clean
20		@echo "Cleaning root binary artifacts..."
21		rm -f ddx
22	
23	# Run tests
24	test: cli-test
25	
26	# Validate the shared bead schema
27	bead-schema: cli-bead-schema
28	
29	# Validate bundled skill metadata
30	skill-schema: cli-skill-schema
31	
32	# Run linter
33	lint: cli-lint
34	
35	# Check docs for unallowlisted legacy routing vocabulary
36	docs-routing-lint:
37		@echo "Checking docs for legacy routing references..."
38		bash scripts/check-legacy-routing-docs.sh
39	
40	# Install locally
41	install: build
42		@echo "Installing DDx locally..."
43		./install.sh --from-build $(CLI_BINARY)
44	
45	# Format code
46	fmt:
47		@echo "Formatting Go code..."
48		cd $(CLI_DIR) && go fmt ./...
49	
50	# CLI-specific targets (delegate to cli/Makefile)
51	cli-build:
52		@echo "Building DDx CLI..."
53		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) build
54	
55	cli-clean:
56		@echo "Cleaning CLI build artifacts..."
57		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) clean
58	
59	cli-test:
60		@echo "Running CLI tests..."
61		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) test
62	
63	cli-bead-schema:
64		@echo "Validating bead schema..."
65		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) bead-schema
66	
67	cli-skill-schema:
68		@echo "Validating skill metadata..."
69		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) skill-schema
70	
71	cli-lint:
72		@echo "Running CLI linter..."
73		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) lint
74	
75	cli-deps:
76		@echo "Installing CLI dependencies..."
77		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) deps
78	
79	cli-update-deps:
80		@echo "Updating CLI dependencies..."
81		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) update-deps
82	
83	# Development targets
84	dev: build
85		@echo "Running DDx in development mode..."
86		./$(CLI_BINARY) $(ARGS)
87	
88	# Build for all platforms
89	build-all:
90		@echo "Building for all platforms..."
91		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) build-all
92	
93	# Create release
94	release:
95		@echo "Creating release..."
96		cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) release
97	
98	# MCP server management (uses local .claude/settings.local.json by default)
99	mcp-list: build
100		@echo "Listing available MCP servers..."
101		./$(CLI_BINARY) mcp list
102	
103	mcp-install: build
104		@echo "Installing MCP server to local project configuration..."
105		@if [ -z "$(SERVER)" ]; then \
106			echo "❌ Error: SERVER variable required. Usage: make mcp-install SERVER=server-name"; \
107			exit 1; \
108		fi
109		./$(CLI_BINARY) mcp install $(SERVER) --config-path .claude/settings.local.json --yes
110	
111	mcp-install-global: build
112		@echo "Installing MCP server to global configuration..."
113		@if [ -z "$(SERVER)" ]; then \
114			echo "❌ Error: SERVER variable required. Usage: make mcp-install-global SERVER=server-name"; \
115			exit 1; \
116		fi
117		./$(CLI_BINARY) mcp install $(SERVER) --yes
118	
119	mcp-status: build
120		@echo "Checking MCP server status..."
121		./$(CLI_BINARY) mcp status
122	
123	# Diagnose project
124	doctor: build
125		@echo "Running DDx diagnostics..."
126		./$(CLI_BINARY) doctor
127	
128	# Update from master repository
129	update: build
130		@echo "Updating DDx from master repository..."
131		./$(CLI_BINARY) update
132	
133	# Show help
134	help:
135		@echo "DDx Root Build System"
136		@echo ""
137		@echo "Main Targets:"
138		@echo "  all          - Build CLI (default)"
139		@echo "  build        - Build CLI to cli/build/ddx"
140		@echo "  clean        - Clean all build artifacts"
141		@echo "  test         - Run all tests"
142		@echo "  lint         - Run linter"
143		@echo "  install      - Install DDx locally to ~/.local/bin"
144		@echo "  fmt          - Format Go code"
145		@echo ""
146		@echo "Development:"
147		@echo "  dev          - Run DDx with arguments (set ARGS='...')"
148		@echo "  doctor       - Run DDx project diagnostics"
149		@echo "  update       - Update from master repository"
150		@echo ""
151		@echo "CLI Targets:"
152		@echo "  cli-build    - Build CLI only"
153		@echo "  cli-clean    - Clean CLI build artifacts"
154		@echo "  cli-test     - Run CLI tests"
155		@echo "  cli-lint     - Run CLI linter"
156		@echo "  cli-bead-schema - Validate the shared bead schema"
157		@echo "  cli-skill-schema - Validate bundled skill metadata"
158		@echo "  cli-deps     - Install CLI dependencies"
159		@echo ""
160		@echo "Release:"
161		@echo "  build-all    - Build for all platforms"
162		@echo "  release      - Create release archives"
163		@echo ""
164		@echo "MCP Server Management:"
165		@echo "  mcp-list           - List available MCP servers"
166		@echo "  mcp-install        - Install MCP server locally (requires SERVER=name)"
167		@echo "  mcp-install-global - Install MCP server globally (requires SERVER=name)"
168		@echo "  mcp-status         - Check MCP server status"
169		@echo ""
170		@echo "Variables:"
171		@echo "  ARGS         - Arguments to pass to 'dev' target"
172		@echo "  SERVER       - MCP server name for 'mcp-install' target"
173		@echo ""
174		@echo "Examples:"
175		@echo "  make build                           # Build CLI"
176		@echo "  make bead-schema                    # Validate bead schema"
177		@echo "  make skill-schema                   # Validate SKILL.md metadata"
178		@echo "  make dev ARGS='mcp list'             # Run with arguments"
179		@echo "  make mcp-install SERVER=filesystem   # Install to local project"
180		@echo "  make mcp-install-global SERVER=github # Install globally"

1	# DDx CLI Makefile
2	
3	# Build variables
4	VERSION ?= $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty)
5	COMMIT ?= $(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)
6	DATE ?= $(shell date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
7	LDFLAGS = -ldflags "-X main.version=${VERSION} -X main.commit=${COMMIT} -X main.date=${DATE}"
8	
9	# Build directory
10	BUILD_DIR = build
11	
12	# Platforms to build for
13	PLATFORMS = \
14		darwin/amd64 \
15		darwin/arm64 \
16		linux/amd64 \
17		linux/arm64 \
18		windows/amd64
19	
20	.PHONY: all build clean test test-full test-perf lint deps help obsidian-migrate obsidian-validate obsidian-test obsidian-dry-run obsidian-nav obsidian-revert bead-schema skill-schema gendocs frontend-build frontend-rebuild frontend-verify copy-skills eval-skill bench-graphql
21	
22	# Default target
23	all: clean deps test build
24	
25	# Build SvelteKit frontend (required before Go build for //go:embed).
26	# Skip rebuild when no source file is newer than the last build output.
27	FRONTEND_SRC := $(shell find internal/server/frontend/src internal/server/frontend/static -type f 2>/dev/null)
28	FRONTEND_STAMP := internal/server/frontend/build/.frontend-build-stamp
29	
30	frontend-build: $(FRONTEND_STAMP)
31	
32	$(FRONTEND_STAMP): $(FRONTEND_SRC) internal/server/frontend/package.json internal/server/frontend/svelte.config.js internal/server/frontend/vite.config.ts
33		@echo "Building SvelteKit frontend..."
34		cd internal/server/frontend && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build
35		@touch internal/server/frontend/build/.gitkeep $(FRONTEND_STAMP)
36	
37	# Force a frontend rebuild regardless of timestamps
38	frontend-rebuild:
39		@echo "Rebuilding SvelteKit frontend (forced)..."
40		cd internal/server/frontend && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build
41		@$(MAKE) --no-print-directory frontend-verify
42	
43	# Verify the embedded frontend bundle is internally consistent: every
44	# /_app/* asset referenced by index.html must exist on disk. Catches the
45	# class of bug where index.html and the chunk dir get out of sync (partial
46	# build, file restore, manual edit) and go:embed silently bakes in a
47	# broken bundle that 404s every JS chunk to the SPA shell.
48	frontend-verify:
49		@echo "Verifying embedded frontend bundle integrity..."
50		@cd internal/server/frontend/build && \
51		missing=0; \
52		for ref in $$(grep -hoE '"/_app/[^"]+"' index.html | tr -d '"' | sort -u); do \
53			path=".$$ref"; \
54			if [ ! -f "$$path" ]; then \
55				echo "  MISSING: $$ref"; \
56				missing=$$((missing+1)); \
57			fi; \
58		done; \
59		if [ $$missing -gt 0 ]; then \
60			echo "frontend-verify: $$missing referenced asset(s) missing — run 'make frontend-rebuild'"; \
61			exit 1; \
62		fi; \
63		echo "  ok"
64	
65	# Sync the canonical default-plugin skill tree (../library/skills/) and its
66	# manifest into internal/registry/defaultplugin/library/ so //go:embed (which
67	# cannot traverse upward out of the package) picks them up. Runs as a prereq
68	# of build/test/dev so contributors never see a stale embedded default
69	# package. rsync --delete keeps the skill destination in exact sync.
70	DEFAULT_PKG_SRC := ../library
71	DEFAULT_PKG_DST := internal/registry/defaultplugin/library
72	copy-skills:
73		@if [ ! -d "$(DEFAULT_PKG_SRC)/skills" ]; then \
74			echo "error: $(DEFAULT_PKG_SRC)/skills not found (run from cli/)"; exit 1; \
75		fi
76		@rsync -a --delete $(DEFAULT_PKG_SRC)/skills/ $(DEFAULT_PKG_DST)/skills/
77		@cp $(DEFAULT_PKG_SRC)/package.yaml $(DEFAULT_PKG_DST)/package.yaml
78	
79	# Build for current platform
80	build: copy-skills frontend-build frontend-verify
81		@echo "Building DDx CLI..."
82		@mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR)
83		go build $(LDFLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/ddx .
84	
85	# Build for all platforms
86	build-all: clean deps copy-skills
87		@echo "Building for all platforms..."
88		@mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR)
89		@echo "Building current platform..."
90		go build $(LDFLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/ddx .
91		@for platform in $(PLATFORMS); do \
92			OS=$$(echo $$platform | cut -d'/' -f1); \
93			ARCH=$$(echo $$platform | cut -d'/' -f2); \
94			echo "Building $$OS/$$ARCH..."; \
95			GOOS=$$OS GOARCH=$$ARCH go build $(LDFLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/ddx-$$OS-$$ARCH .; \
96			if [ $$OS = "windows" ]; then \
97				mv $(BUILD_DIR)/ddx-$$OS-$$ARCH $(BUILD_DIR)/ddx-$$OS-$$ARCH.exe; \
98			fi; \
99		done
100	
101	# Install dependencies
102	deps:
103		@echo "Installing dependencies..."
104		go mod download
105		go mod tidy
106	
107	# Run tests
108	test: copy-skills
109		@echo "Running tests..."
110		go test -v ./...
111	
112	# Run full test suite with race detector and coverage (mirrors CI; opt-in for local pre-push verification)
113	test-full: copy-skills
114		@echo "Running full test suite (race + coverage)..."
115		for var in $$(git rev-parse --local-env-vars 2>/dev/null); do unset "$$var"; done; \
116		CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -race -cover ./...
117	
118	# Run the GraphQL perf harness (ddx-9ce6842a). Seeds a 10 × 500 bead fixture
119	# and records baseline numbers under docs/helix/06-iterate/perf/. Override
120	# the fixture size or the report date via BENCH_REPORT_DATE.
121	BENCH_REPORT_DIR ?= $(abspath ../docs/helix/06-iterate/perf)
122	BENCH_REPORT_DATE ?= $(shell date -u +%Y-%m-%d)
123	bench-graphql:
124		@echo "Running GraphQL perf harness (fixture: 10 × 500 beads = 5,000)..."
125		@mkdir -p $(BENCH_REPORT_DIR)
126		DDX_BENCH_REPORT_DIR=$(BENCH_REPORT_DIR) \
127		DDX_BENCH_REPORT_DATE=$(BENCH_REPORT_DATE) \
128		go test -tags=perf ./internal/server/perf/ -run TestGraphQLPerfMatrix_Baseline -v -timeout 5m
129		@echo "Baseline report written to $(BENCH_REPORT_DIR)/$(BENCH_REPORT_DATE)-baseline.md"
130	
131	# Run perf tests (excluded from default `make test`; use this target or CI perf job)
132	test-perf:
133		@echo "Running perf tests (excluded from default test run)..."
134		go test -tags=perf ./internal/server/perf/... -v -timeout 5m
135	
136	# Validate the shared bead record schema
137	bead-schema:
138		@echo "Validating bead record schema..."
139		go test ./internal/bead -run 'TestBeadRecordSchema' -count=1
140	
141	# Validate bundled skill metadata
142	skill-schema:
143		@echo "Validating bundled skill metadata..."
144		go run . skills check
145	
146	# Run linter
147	lint:
148		@echo "Running linter..."
149		@if command -v golangci-lint >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
150			golangci-lint run; \
151		else \
152			echo "golangci-lint not found, running go vet instead"; \
153			go vet ./...; \
154		fi
155		@echo "Running routinglint (FEAT-006 anti-reintroduction gate)..."
156		@go run ./tools/lint/routinglint/cmd/routinglint ./...
157	
158	# Install locally for development
159	install: build
160		@echo "Installing DDx locally..."
161		../install.sh --from-build $(BUILD_DIR)/ddx
162	
163	# Clean build artifacts
164	clean:
165		@echo "Cleaning..."
166		rm -rf $(BUILD_DIR)
167	
168	# Run the CLI (for development)
169	run:
170		go run . $(ARGS)
171	
172	# Format code
173	fmt:
174		go fmt ./...
175	
176	# Update dependencies
177	update-deps:
178		go get -u all
179		go mod tidy
180	
181	# Create release archives
182	release: build-all
183		@echo "Creating release archives..."
184		@cd $(BUILD_DIR) && \
185		for file in ddx-*; do \
186			if [[ $$file == *.exe ]]; then \
187				zip $${file%.*}.zip $$file; \
188			else \
189				tar -czf $$file.tar.gz $$file; \
190			fi; \
191		done
192	
193	# Development server (watches for changes)
194	dev: copy-skills
195		@echo "Starting development mode..."
196		@if command -v air >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
197			air; \
198		else \
199			echo "Air not found. Install with: go install github.com/cosmtrek/air@latest"; \
200			echo "Falling back to basic run..."; \
201			go run . $(ARGS); \
202		fi
203	
204	# Obsidian integration targets
205	obsidian-migrate: build
206		@echo "Migrating HELIX workflow to Obsidian format..."
207		./$(BUILD_DIR)/ddx obsidian migrate workflows/helix
208	
209	obsidian-validate: build
210		@echo "Validating Obsidian format in HELIX workflow..."
211		./$(BUILD_DIR)/ddx obsidian validate workflows/helix
212	
213	obsidian-test:
214		@echo "Running Obsidian integration tests..."
215		go test ./internal/obsidian/... -v
216		go test ./internal/obsidian/converter/... -v
217		go test ./internal/obsidian/validator/... -v
218	
219	obsidian-dry-run: build
220		@echo "Running Obsidian migration dry-run..."
221		./$(BUILD_DIR)/ddx obsidian migrate --dry-run workflows/helix
222	
223	obsidian-nav: build
224		@echo "Generating navigation hub..."
225		./$(BUILD_DIR)/ddx obsidian nav workflows/helix
226	
227	obsidian-revert: build
228		@echo "Reverting Obsidian migration..."
229		./$(BUILD_DIR)/ddx obsidian revert --strip-frontmatter workflows/helix
230	
231	# Generate Hugo markdown docs for every CLI command
232	gendocs:
233		@echo "Generating CLI reference docs..."
234		go run ./tools/gendoc
235	
236	# Show help
237	help:
238		@echo "DDx CLI Build System"
239		@echo ""
240		@echo "Targets:"
241		@echo "  all         - Clean, install deps, test, and build"
242		@echo "  build       - Build for current platform"
243		@echo "  build-all   - Build for all platforms"
244		@echo "  deps        - Install dependencies"
245		@echo "  test        - Run tests"
246		@echo "  test-full   - Run full test suite with race detector + coverage (mirrors CI)"
247		@echo "  lint        - Run linter"
248		@echo "  bead-schema - Validate the shared bead record schema"
249		@echo "  skill-schema - Validate bundled SKILL.md metadata"
250		@echo "  install     - Install locally for development"
251		@echo "  clean       - Remove build artifacts"
252		@echo "  run         - Run the CLI (set ARGS='...' for arguments)"
253		@echo "  fmt         - Format code"
254		@echo "  update-deps - Update dependencies"
255		@echo "  release     - Create release archives"
256		@echo "  dev         - Development mode with file watching"
257		@echo "  gendocs     - Generate CLI reference docs for the website"
258		@echo "  help        - Show this help"
259		@echo ""
260		@echo "Obsidian Integration:"
261		@echo "  obsidian-migrate   - Migrate HELIX to Obsidian format"
262		@echo "  obsidian-validate  - Validate Obsidian format"
263		@echo "  obsidian-test      - Run Obsidian integration tests"
264		@echo "  obsidian-dry-run   - Preview migration changes"
265		@echo "  obsidian-nav       - Generate navigation hub"
266		@echo "  obsidian-revert    - Revert Obsidian migration"
267		@echo ""
268		@echo "Variables:"
269		@echo "  VERSION     - Version string (default: git describe)"
270		@echo "  COMMIT      - Commit hash (default: git rev-parse)"
271		@echo "  DATE        - Build date (default: current UTC time)"
272		@echo "  ARGS        - Arguments to pass to 'run' target"
273	
274	# Run the ddx skill eval suite (validation + routing checks)
275	# Use `make eval-skill` for the full suite, or invoke the script directly
276	# with `--validate` for structural conformance only (no harness calls).
277	eval-skill: copy-skills
278		@cd .. && scripts/eval-skill.sh
279

data.output: The file /var/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-96ccd9c0-20260514T090626-d4274524/cli/Makefile has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.old_string:
# Run perf tests (excluded from default `make test`; use this target or CI perf job)
test-perf:
input.new_string:
# Enforce the aggregate coverage ratchet recorded in coverage-baseline.yml.
# Kept separate from `make test` because building a coverage profile across
# the full module is slower than the verbose smoke run developers use for
# fast feedback; CI / quality gates invoke this target explicitly.
COVERAGE_PROFILE ?= coverage.out
COVERAGE_BASELINE ?= coverage-baseline.yml
coverage-ratchet: copy-skills
	@echo "Running coverage ratchet (go test -coverprofile=$(COVERAGE_PROFILE))..."
	@go test -coverprofile=$(COVERAGE_PROFILE) ./...
	@go run ./tools/coverage-ratchet -profile $(COVERAGE_PROFILE) -baseline $(COVERAGE_BASELINE)

# Run perf tests (excluded from default `make test`; use this target or CI perf job)
test-perf:

	@echo "  coverage-ratchet - Run go test with coverage and enforce baseline in coverage-baseline.yml"

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
test: add coverage ratchet driven by checked-in baseline [ddx-96ccd9c0]

Adds cli/tools/coverage-ratchet, a small Go tool that reads an aggregate
coverage percentage from a `go test -coverprofile` run and fails when it
regresses below the value in cli/coverage-baseline.yml. The baseline is
loaded from the YAML file with no compiled fallback, so a missing or
unreadable config errors rather than silently passing.

The new `make coverage-ratchet` target wires the workflow end to end:
it runs `go test -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...` and then enforces
the baseline. Kept separate from `make test` because building a full
coverage profile is slower than the smoke run developers use for fast
feedback; CI/quality gates invoke this target explicitly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

data.text: Bead complete. Coverage ratchet tool, three required tests, baseline config (`cli/coverage-baseline.yml`), and `make coverage-ratchet` target are in place. Lefthook green; ratchet workflow verified end to end. The pre-existing `TestServerWorker_WiresPreClaimIntakeHook` failure on base rev `4b88cbe27` is unrelated (reproduced with my changes stashed).
